response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has reached its Series A funding stage, raising $8.5M from leading investors Sequoia and YC to scale its business. The 18-person startup currently boasts a $42M valuation, generates $120K in monthly recurring revenue (MRR), and sustains a strong 25% month-over-month (MoM) growth rate that underscores its rapid traction in its competitive sector.
